canonical_question: How do you integrate CRM to ERP for ASC 606 / IFRS 15 revenue recognition scheduling?
aliases: CRM to ERP revenue recognition integration ASC 606 IFRS 15
How to automate ASC 606 five-step model across Salesforce and ERP
Revenue recognition scheduling integration performance obligations SSP allocation
Contract modification handling ASC 606 CRM ERP revenue sub-ledger

temporal_validity.last_breaking_change: Salesforce Revenue Cloud Advanced replaces legacy CPQ billing (2025-04)

constraints: SSP allocation must happen in revenue engine not CRM — pre-allocating breaks compliance on modification
Contract modifications require near-real-time propagation — batch-only daily sync insufficient for frequent modifications
Performance obligations must be individually tracked at line level, not contract-level aggregates
Variable consideration requires periodic re-estimation each reporting period
Audit trail from CRM contract to GL journal legally required under SOX
Multi-currency contracts require FX rate at contract inception, not current rate

skip_this_unit_if.condition: Need general order-to-cash integration without revenue recognition complexity
Need single-system Salesforce CPQ reference only
Need subscription billing without ASC 606 compliance

depends_on.label: Quote-to-Cash Integration — upstream process feeding revenue recognition

related_to.label: Order-to-Cash Integration — broader O2C flow including fulfillment
Record-to-Report Integration — downstream financial close process

alternative_to.label: Salesforce-SAP Integration — alternative ERP target for revenue recognition

often_confused_with.label: Order-to-Cash — revenue recognition is a subset of O2C, not the same thing

inputs_needed.question: Which CRM system originates the contracts?
Which revenue recognition engine does the ERP use?
What is the typical contract structure?
How often are contracts modified mid-term?
